question: Which element powers the engines of Vexian starships?

answers.original: Vexium (element 147) powers the engines of Vexian starships.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer.

entities.name: Vexian Starships
entities.description: Vexian starships are spacecraft that use stabilized plasma from element 147 (Vexium) to power their engines and can travel at 0.7 light speed.

entities.name: Vexian Propulsion Systems
entities.description: Vexian propulsion systems utilize stabilized Vexium plasma to achieve high-speed travel.

entities.name: Vexium
entities.description: Vexium (element 147) is a stabilized plasma used exclusively in Vexian propulsion systems.

entities.name: Chromatic Colors
entities.description: All Vexian starships are painted in chromatic colors.

relations.description: Vexian starships use stabilized Vexium plasma to power their engines.
Vexium is stabilized into plasma form for use in Vexian propulsion systems.
All Vexian starships are painted in chromatic colors.
Vexian starships are operated by crews consisting of 12 members.
Vexian starships use quantum entanglement for positioning in their navigation systems.
Vexian starships cannot operate in atmospheres.
The first Vexian starship was built 500 years ago, marking the beginning of Vexian starship technology.
